title: NOBODY EXPECTED THIS ON OPENING NIGHT! | BATTLEBOTS PRO LEAGUE EP 1 | POWERED BY BRIGHT DATA
description:
NEW AND EXCLUSIVE: BattleBots Pro League powered by Bright Data is the toughest robot combat event on the planet. 24 elite bots from across the globe converge on Las Vegas for the ultimate fight to the death. There are 6 Groups of 4 bots, each of which has to fight everyone in the Group. The Group winners progress to the Knockout rounds, so every fight matters and there are no second chances.

In this first episode, hosted by Chris Rose and Kenny Florian, END GAME, the odds-on favourite from New Zealand, faces California’s MALICE, GOLDEN FURY from India fights Australia’s DEATH ROLL, and HYPERSHOCK confronts HUGE.

Announcer: Faruq Tauheed

Learn More about our Ultimate Sponsor BRIGHT DATA
https://brightdata.com/?utm_source=brand&utm_campaign=brnd-mkt_youtube_battlebots_episode
 
🔔Watch free worldwide on YouTube and subscribe so you don’t miss a single fight.
🎟️ Come see BattleBots Destruct-A-Thon LIVE in Vegas:
https://battlebots.com/tickets/

#battlebots

02:00 - Death Roll vs Golden Fury
06:55 - Pro League Explained
07:38 - HyperShock vs HUGE Build Up
10:30 - HyperShock vs HUGE
13:57 - End Game vs Malice Build Up
16:24 - End Game vs Malice
20:48 - Next Time on Pro League

description:
Can an AI-powered robot from Canada outdrive a BattleBots legend from the United States?

It's the climax of the first round in the Group Stages. These final three battles have huge consequences for the leaderboard. THE TWINS aim to use skilled coordination to take on COBALT, the powerhouse originally built in the UK. BLOODSPORT and the Brazilian Bull MINOTAUR bring two of the sport’s most dangerous weapons into a head-on clash. And ORBITRON puts AI to the test against one of the world’s most experienced human drivers - Mike Gellatly from WITCH DOCTOR. 

FIGHTS:
• Cobalt (UK/USA) vs. The Twins (USA)
• Bloodsport (USA) vs. Minotaur (Brazil)
• Orbitron (Canada) vs. Witch Doctor (USA)

24 elite robots compete in the toughest robot fighting tournament in the world: the BattleBots Pro League powered by Bright Data. The pressure is intense, and every fight matters. Don’t miss a second of the action. Hosted by Chris Rose & Kenny Florian.

Learn more about our Ultimate sponsor Bright Data:
https://brightdata.com/?utm_source=brand&utm_campaign=brnd-mkt_youtube_battlebots_episode
